decision.summary: No new action: the daily 77k dip is now live and working, while the weekly 80k reach is still unresolved, so there is no need to force an extra slot.
decision.rationale: Reconciliation is clean. Binance spot is 77630.42, only 0.24% above the 24h low, with shorts still dominant and open interest contracting, which supports the bearish intraday thesis behind the newly opened daily 77k dip. That position is already active around 64%, so the same-day downside view is being expressed cleanly. The weekly 80k reach remains open around 41%, still representing the alternative higher-timeframe upside continuation without yet being weak enough to discard or strong enough for take-profit. No open position is in the 90-95% take-profit zone. For new entries, the nearby 76k dip is only about 24% and too weak to justify a second bearish daily, while the nearest upside daily, 79k reach, is only about 32% and would be a low-quality countertrend momentum trade rather than a clear non-thesis continuation. The old weekly 72k dip remains discarded_for_slot and needs no action. The correct action is to hold the live daily 77k dip and the weekly 80k reach without opening anything new.
